DG-LZ-MON.name: dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group
DG-LZ-MON.description: dynamic group for security functions execution, required for Logging Analytics

PCY-MON-SERVICES.name: pcy-mon-services
PCY-MON-SERVICES.description: Policy to allow usage of Observability services in tenancy.
statements: Allow service operations-insights to use ons-topics in tenancy
Allow service operations-insights to read autonomous-database-family in tenancy where ALL{request.operation='GenerateAutonomousDatabaseWallet'}
Allow service operations-insights to read secret-family in tenancy
Allow service loganalytics to use metrics in tenancy
Allow service loganalytics to READ loganalytics-features-family in tenancy

PCY-MON-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-global-mon-admin
PCY-MON-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-mon-admins group users to manage Observability services/resources in tenancy.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to inspect all-resources in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to read users in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to read compartments in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage compartments in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-platform:cmp-lz-platform-monitoring
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage compartments in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-platform-monitoring
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage compartments in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-preprod:cmp-lz-preprod-platform:cmp-lz-preprod-platform-monitoring
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage metrics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage ons-topics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage dbmgmt-private-endpoints in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to read dbmgmt-work-requests in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage dbmgmt-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to use database-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to use autonomous-database-family in tenancy
Allow service dpd to read secret-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-security

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to use vaults in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-security where target.vault.id='ocid1.vault.oc1.eu-frankfurt-1.ent6ftu3aadca.abtheljslefh3brj27mglgl5b3vt4mvd4e5lxiib5qy2mjej7mutb2yelb5a'

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to use keys in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-security where target.key.id='ocid1.key.oc1.eu-frankfurt-1.ent6ftu3aadca.abtheljsrfrdrkcjgvdvegkolv4o642pkpfl4fyh3dzxled3wutrhhwc3mxa'
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage secret-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-security
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to use security-lists in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage network-security-groups in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-projects:cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to read virtual-network-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to use subnets in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to use vnics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage opsi-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage management-dashboard-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage management-agents in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to inspect ons-topic in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage management-agent-install-keys in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to read instance-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to read instance-agent-plugins in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage loganalytics-features-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage loganalytics-ingesttime-rule in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group to use metrics in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group to {LOG_ANALYTICS_LOG_GROUP_UPLOAD_LOGS} in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage management-dashboard in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-mon-admins' to manage management-saved-search in tenancy

Allow service dpd to read secret-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-security
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to inspect keys in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-security
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage opsi-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage management-dashboard-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage management-agents in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to inspect ons-topic in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage management-agent-install-keys in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to read instance-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to read instance-agent-plugins in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage loganalytics-features-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-mon-admins' to manage loganalytics-ingesttime-rule in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
Allow dynamic-group dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group to use metrics in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
Allow dynamic-group dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group to {LOG_ANALYTICS_LOG_GROUP_UPLOAD_LOGS} in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod
